title: Tuberculosis in England, 2025 report
body: "This report from the UK Health Security Agency (UKHSA) presents people with TB disease notified to the National Tuberculosis Surveillance System (NTBS). It aims to describe the epidemiology of TB in England up to the end of 2024.  Previous annual reports before 2024 (reporting data up until 2023), is available online:   Tuberculosis in England, 2024 report (data up to end of 2023) Tuberculosis in England, 2023 report (data up to end of 2022) Tuberculosis in England, 2022 report (data up to end of 2021) Tuberculosis in England, 2021 report (data up to end of 2020) Tuberculosis in England, 2020 report (data up to end of 2019)   If you have any feedback or questions about these statistics, please contact TBsection@ukhsa.gov.uk  "
